title: 旅行英语
description: 出国旅行不慌张的最低限度英语！

scenes.speech: 有旅行英语世界哪都能去加鲁！✈️
scenes.title: 旅途英语
scenes.content: 本课学习「旅行英语」。机场、酒店、景点真正需要的句子精选学习。

scenes.speech: 机场第一关是入境审查！
scenes.title: 入境审查
scenes.content: 被问What's the purpose of your visit?时，答Sightseeing.（旅游）或Studying.（学习）一词即可。
scenes.highlight:
Q: Purpose of visit?
A: Sightseeing. / Studying.

scenes.speech: 酒店「我有预订」是魔法句！
scenes.title: 酒店入住
scenes.content: I have a reservation. My name is ___.只这两句就能用预订名办入住。关键是I have a reservation.一句。
scenes.highlight:
I have a reservation.
My name is ___ .

scenes.title: 问路
scenes.content: Excuse me, where is the station?车站、公交站、洗手间，问位置必备句。

scenes.title: 问价
scenes.content: How much is this?购物绝对用得上。没价签时这一句就能问到。
scenes.highlight:
How much is this?
How much does it cost?

scenes.title: 遇到困难时
scenes.content: I don't speak English well. Could you speak slowly, please?不用完美，遇困直说最有效。
scenes.highlight:
I don't speak English well.
Could you speak slowly?

scenes.title: Wi-Fi
scenes.content: Is there Wi-Fi? What's the password?咖啡馆或酒店问这两句立刻能上网。
scenes.highlight:
Is there Wi-Fi?
What's the password?

scenes.title: 紧急情况
scenes.content: Help! Call the police! Where is the hospital?万一出事时能脱口而出，先大声练习。
scenes.highlight:
Help!
Call the police!
Where is the hospital?

scenes.speech: 旅行是相遇的宝库！享受对话！
scenes.title: 和当地人聊天
scenes.content: Where are you from?是全世界旅行者最先问的话。回I'm from Japan.简单就行！
scenes.highlight:
Q: Where are you from?
A: I'm from Japan.

scenes.speech: 小测验加鲁！「多少钱？」用英语怎么说？
scenes.quizExplanation: How much is this?问价格的基本句。购物必备。

scenes.speech: 旅行准备就绪加鲁🌟去看世界吧！
scenes.title: 课程完成！
